scenario: I was dating this guy who was having a nervous breakdown. His mother asked me if I would move in with him, cook for him and make sure he was okay. So I moved in with him for a while.
Harm/ Help_expl: Helped take care of someone in need
Betrayal/ Loyalty_expl: Stayed loyal to the boyfriend during tough times
Subversion/ Authority_expl: No subversion or disregard for authority
Degradation/ Sanctity_expl: No degradation or violation of sanctity
Oppression/ Liberty_expl: No oppression, rather supported someone's liberty
moral_expl: Helping and supporting someone during tough times

scenario: Translated menu items for a foreigner in a restaurant
Harm/ Help_expl: No harm is intended, assistance provided
Cheating/ Fairness_expl: No unfair advantage or cheating involved
Betrayal/ Loyalty_expl: No betrayal or disloyalty in the scenario
Subversion/ Authority_expl: Respecting authority but adding user-friendly changes
Degradation/ Sanctity_expl: No degradation, merely catering to cultural differences
Oppression/ Liberty_expl: Enhancing freedom to access information, not oppressive
moral_expl: Translated menu items promote inclusiveness and help foreigners, positively affecting their dining experience

scenario: Spent time voluntarily tutoring disadvantaged students
Harm/ Help_expl: Promotes helping and support, encouraging education
Cheating/ Fairness_expl: Does not involve cheating; tutoring encourages fairness
Betrayal/ Loyalty_expl: Does not apply as tutoring is a choice without obligations
Subversion/ Authority_expl: Does not involve subversion of any authority figures
Degradation/ Sanctity_expl: Does not degrade any sacred values or practices
Oppression/ Liberty_expl: Enhances liberty through education and empowerment
